why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:command_suggestions / 0x0f must dispatch and decode the official empty-suggestions fixture generated from client.jar ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, Suggestions), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.STREAM_CODEC, and GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(...).
what: The exact Rust oracle test cannot compile because stevenarella protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayCommandSuggestionsClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound command_suggestions packet body.
answer: oracle/answers/775/play_command_suggestions_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl records packet id 15, framed hex 0f7b010300, body hex 7b010300, command id 123, range start 1, range length 3, suggestion count 0, and full official decode consumption for ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.
